decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id route_b46-local-2012 already exists in the registry as the same B46 Local route (Brooklyn, local service, Broadway/Utica Avenue). The observation resolves to its own record — no different target exists to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46: second busiest bus route in NYC
B46 local buses make all stops

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id route_b46-limited-2012 already exists in the registry as the same B46 Limited-Stop route (Brooklyn, limited-stop service, Broadway/Utica Avenue). The observation resolves to its own record — no different target exists to link to. Different service variant from B46 Local (local vs limited-stop); per do_not_merge_pairs precedent, different variants never merge.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46 Limited-Stop buses operate 7 days a week. These buses make limited stops between DeKalb Av/Malcolm X Blvd and Avenue H/Utica Av, and make all stops along the rest of the route.
